full_name.en: Muhammad ibn Musa al-Khwarizmi
full_name.ar: محمد بن موسى الخوارزمي

title.en: Al-Kitāb al-Mukhtaṣar fī Ḥisāb al-Jabr wa-l-Muqābala
title.ar: الكتاب المختصر في حساب الجبر والمقابلة

significance.en: Founded algebra as a systematic discipline; title gave us the word 'algebra'
significance.tr: Cebiri sistematik bir disiplin olarak kurdu; adı 'algebra' kelimesini verdi

significance.en: Corrected Ptolemy's Geography with 2,402 coordinates
significance.tr: Batlamyus'un Coğrafya'sını 2.402 koordinatla düzeltti

significance.en: Introduced Hindu-Arabic numeral system to the Islamic world
significance.tr: Hindu-Arap rakam sistemini İslam dünyasına tanıttı

key_contribution.en: His book title gave us 'algebra', his name gave us 'algorithm' — two words the modern world cannot function without
key_contribution.tr: Kitabının adı 'cebir'i, ismi 'algoritma'yı verdi — modern dünyanın vazgeçemeyeceği iki kelime
key_contribution.ar: عنوان كتابه أعطانا 'الجبر'، واسمه أعطانا 'الخوارزمية' — كلمتان لا يعمل بدونهما العالم الحديث

scholarly_context.en: Synthesized Babylonian sexagesimal arithmetic, Indian decimal notation and zero, and Greek geometric proof into a unified algebraic framework. Not a mere compiler: he introduced systematic solution methods for linear and quadratic equations with no direct precedent, using rhetorical algebra before symbolic notation existed.
scholarly_context.tr: Babil altmışlık aritmetiği, Hint ondalık gösterimi ve sıfırı, Yunan geometrik kanıtını birleşik bir cebirsel çerçevede sentezledi. Salt bir derleyici değil: sembolik gösterim yokken retorik cebir kullanarak birinci ve ikinci dereceden denklemler için sistematik çözüm yöntemleri getirdi.
scholarly_context.ar: جمع الخوارزمي بين الحساب البابلي الستيني والنظام العشري الهندي والبرهان الهندسي اليوناني في إطار جبري موحد. لم يكن مجرد جامع بل قدّم طرق حلّ منهجية للمعادلات الخطية والتربيعية

historiographical_note.en: Sezgin (GAS V) established Khwarizmi's independence from Diophantus, correcting the Eurocentrist assessment found in Brockelmann (GAL I, 215) and the early EI1 article. Roshdi Rashed further demonstrated the originality of Khwarizmi's geometric proofs for quadratic equations.
historiographical_note.tr: Sezgin (GAS V), Harezmî'nin Diyofantos'tan bağımsızlığını kanıtlayarak Brockelmann (GAL I, 215) ve erken EI1 maddesindeki Avrupa-merkezci değerlendirmeyi düzeltti. Roshdi Rashed, Harezmî'nin ikinci dereceden denklemlere geometrik kanıtlarının özgünlüğünü gösterdi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine inventing both the spreadsheet and the programming language — two tools no modern office or computer can function without. That's what Khwarizmi did for mathematics.
modern_parallel.tr: Hem elektronik tabloyu hem programlama dilini icat ettiğini düşünün — hiçbir modern ofisin veya bilgisayarın onsuz çalışamayacağı iki araç. Harezmî matematiğe bunu yaptı.

inherited_from.what: Decimal positional system, zero as placeholder (Brahmagupta)

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الخوارزمي، محمد بن موسى', 'death_hijri': 232, 'page': 'VII/116', 'entry_summary_ar': 'عالم رياضيات وفلك وجغرافية، من أهل خوارزم، عمل في بيت الحكمة ببغداد. ألّف في الجبر والمقابلة كتابًا صار أصلًا لهذا العلم', 'entry_summary_en': 'Mathematician, astronomer and geographer from Khwarezm who worked at the House of Wisdom. Authored the foundational text on algebra.'}

full_name.en: Abu Uthman Amr ibn Bahr al-Jahiz
full_name.tr: Ebû Osmân Amr b. Bahr el-Câhiz
full_name.ar: أبو عثمان عمرو بن بحر الجاحظ

significance.en: Seven-volume zoological encyclopedia with proto-evolutionary observations on adaptation and environmental influence
significance.tr: Adaptasyon ve çevresel etkiye dair proto-evrimci gözlemler içeren yedi ciltlik zooloji ansiklopedisi

significance.en: Satirical masterpiece of Arabic prose — character studies through humor
significance.tr: Arapça nesrin hiciv şaheseri — mizah yoluyla karakter incelemeleri

key_contribution.en: Described food chains, environmental adaptation, and animal struggle for survival — 1,000 years before Darwin's Origin of Species
key_contribution.tr: Besin zincirleri, çevresel adaptasyon ve hayvanların hayatta kalma mücadelesini anlattı — Darwin'in Türlerin Kökeni'nden 1.000 yıl önce
key_contribution.ar: وصف سلاسل الغذاء والتكيف البيئي وصراع الحيوانات من أجل البقاء — قبل أصل الأنواع لداروين بألف عام

scholarly_context.en: Al-Jahiz pioneered a proto-scientific method in zoology: direct observation, environmental determinism, and classification of over 350 animal species. His concept of 'struggle for existence' (al-ṣirāʿ min ajl al-baqāʾ) prefigures natural selection. He also noted that animals in similar environments develop similar characteristics — convergent evolution in modern terms.
scholarly_context.tr: Câhiz, zoolojide proto-bilimsel bir yönteme öncülük etti: doğrudan gözlem, çevresel determinizm ve 350'den fazla hayvan türünün sınıflandırılması. 'Hayatta kalma mücadelesi' kavramı doğal seçilimi önceler. Benzer çevrelerdeki hayvanların benzer özellikler geliştirdiğini de kaydetti — modern terminolojiyle yakınsak evrim.
scholarly_context.ar: ريادة الجاحظ في المنهج العلمي الأولي في علم الحيوان: الملاحظة المباشرة والحتمية البيئية وتصنيف أكثر من ٣٥٠ نوع. مفهومه في 'الصراع من أجل البقاء' يسبق الانتخاب الطبيعي

historiographical_note.en: The extent of Jahiz's proto-evolutionary thinking was largely overlooked in Western scholarship until Bayrakdar (1983) and Stott (2012) drew systematic comparisons with Darwin. Pellat's BRILL article (EI2) focused on literary achievement, undervaluing the scientific dimension.
historiographical_note.tr: Câhiz'in proto-evrimci düşüncesinin kapsamı, Bayrakdar (1983) ve Stott (2012) Darwin ile sistematik karşılaştırmalar yapana kadar Batı akademisinde büyük ölçüde gözden kaçırıldı. Pellat'ın BRILL maddesi (EI2) edebi başarıya odaklanarak bilimsel boyutu küçümsedi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine writing both a National Geographic nature documentary and a New York Times bestselling satire — and having both remain relevant for a millennium.
modern_parallel.tr: Hem bir National Geographic doğa belgeseli hem de New York Times bestseller bir hiciv yazmayı düşünün — ve her ikisinin bin yıl boyunca güncel kalmasını.

inherited_from.what: Kalila wa Dimna animal fable tradition
Pre-Islamic camel and horse taxonomy (ayyām al-ʿArab)

transmitted_to.what: Ḥayāt al-Ḥayawān drew heavily on Jahiz
ʿAjāʾib al-Makhlūqāt continued Jahiz's zoological program
Manuscript copies circulated in Ottoman madrasas

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الجاحظ، عمرو بن بحر', 'death_hijri': 255, 'page': 'V/74', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو عثمان، كبير أئمة الأدب ورئيس فرقة من المعتزلة. ولد في البصرة وتوفي بها. من كتبه: الحيوان، البيان والتبيين، البخلاء', 'entry_summary_en': "Master of Arabic literature and leader of a Mu'tazili faction. Born and died in Basra. Major works: Book of Animals, Book of Eloquence, Book of Misers."}

full_name.en: Abu Ali al-Hasan ibn al-Hasan ibn al-Haytham
full_name.tr: Ebû Alî el-Hasen b. el-Hasen İbn Heysem
full_name.ar: أبو علي الحسن بن الحسن ابن الهيثم

active_places.role: House arrest under al-Hakim; most productive period

significance.en: Seven-volume treatise that overthrew Euclid/Ptolemy emission theory and established modern optics
significance.tr: Öklid/Batlamyus ışın teorisini devirip modern optiği kuran yedi ciltlik eser

title.en: On the Configuration of the World

significance.en: Physical model of celestial mechanics departing from Ptolemaic epicycles
significance.tr: Batlamyusçu episikl modelinden ayrılan fiziksel gök mekaniği modeli

key_contribution.en: Proved that vision works by light entering the eye — not by rays leaving it — and pioneered the experimental scientific method: hypothesis → experiment → conclusion
key_contribution.tr: Görmenin gözden çıkan ışınlarla değil, göze giren ışıkla çalıştığını kanıtladı — ve deneysel bilimsel yönteme öncülük etti: hipotez → deney → sonuç
key_contribution.ar: أثبت أن الرؤية تعمل بدخول الضوء إلى العين — لا بخروج أشعة منها — وأسّس المنهج العلمي التجريبي

scholarly_context.en: Ibn al-Haytham's Kitāb al-Manāẓir is arguably the most important single work in the history of optics. He replaced the emission theory of Euclid and Ptolemy — dominant for 1,000 years — with an intromission model supported by controlled experiments including the camera obscura. His insistence on reproducible experimentation predates Roger Bacon by two centuries.
scholarly_context.tr: İbn Heysem'in Kitâbü'l-Menâzır, optik tarihinin tartışmasız en önemli tek eseridir. 1.000 yıl dominant olan Öklid ve Batlamyus ışın teorisini, camera obscura dahil kontrollü deneylerle desteklenen bir girdi modeliyle değiştirdi. Tekrarlanabilir deney ısrarı Roger Bacon'dan iki yüzyıl öncedir.
scholarly_context.ar: كتاب المناظر لابن الهيثم أهم عمل منفرد في تاريخ البصريات. استبدل نظرية الإبصار لإقليدس وبطليموس بنموذج مدعوم بتجارب مضبوطة بما في ذلك الغرفة المظلمة. إصراره على التجريب القابل للتكرار سبق روجر بيكن بقرنين

historiographical_note.en: Sabra's critical edition and translation (1989) of Kitāb al-Manāẓir restored Ibn al-Haytham's priority over Bacon and Kepler in Western optics historiography. Earlier accounts (e.g., Crombie 1953) attributed the experimental method primarily to 13th-century Europeans.
historiographical_note.tr: Sabra'nın Kitâbü'l-Menâzır'ın kritik edisyonu ve çevirisi (1989), Batı optik tarihyazımında İbn Heysem'in Bacon ve Kepler üzerindeki önceliğini yeniden kurdu. Önceki çalışmalar (örn. Crombie 1953) deneysel yöntemi ağırlıklı olarak 13. yüzyıl Avrupalılarına atfediyordu.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a physicist under house arrest proving that 1,000 years of consensus physics was wrong — and then inventing the scientific method as a bonus. He's the Galileo of optics, three centuries early.
modern_parallel.tr: Ev hapsindeki bir fizikçinin 1.000 yıllık konsensüs fiziğinin yanlış olduğunu kanıtladığını — ve bonus olarak bilimsel yöntemi icat ettiğini düşünün. Optiğin Galileo'su, üç yüzyıl erken.

transmitted_to.what: Ad Vitellionem Paralipomena built on Alhazen's intromission model
La Dioptrique inherited the camera obscura concept

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن الهيثم، الحسن بن الحسن', 'death_hijri': 430, 'page': 'V/320', 'entry_summary_ar': 'عالم بالرياضيات والهندسة والطب والفلسفة والفيزياء والمناظر. من البصرة. ألّف نحو مائتي كتاب. اشتهر بكتاب المناظر', 'entry_summary_en': 'Scholar of mathematics, geometry, medicine, philosophy, physics and optics from Basra. Authored approximately 200 works. Famous for Kitab al-Manazir.'}

full_name.en: Abu Rayhan Muhammad ibn Ahmad al-Biruni
full_name.tr: Ebû Reyhân Muhammed b. Ahmed el-Bîrûnî
full_name.ar: أبو الريحان محمد بن أحمد البيروني

significance.en: First objective comparative study of Indian civilization by a Muslim scholar
significance.tr: Bir Müslüman alim tarafından Hint medeniyetinin ilk nesnel karşılaştırmalı çalışması

significance.en: Encyclopedic astronomical/geographical work with 1,029 star positions
significance.tr: 1.029 yıldız konumunu içeren ansiklopedik astronomi/coğrafya eseri

significance.en: Pharmacological dictionary with drug names in Arabic, Greek, Syriac, Persian, Hindi
significance.tr: Arapça, Yunanca, Süryanice, Farsça, Hintçe ilaç adlarını içeren farmakoloji sözlüğü

key_contribution.en: Calculated Earth's radius to within 1% of the modern value — using a mountain and trigonometry, 500 years before Europeans tried
key_contribution.tr: Dünya'nın yarıçapını modern değerin %1'i dahilinde hesapladı — bir dağ ve trigonometri kullanarak, Avrupalılar denemeden 500 yıl önce
key_contribution.ar: حسب نصف قطر الأرض بدقة ١٪ من القيمة الحديثة — باستخدام جبل ومثلثات، قبل محاولة الأوروبيين بخمسة قرون

scholarly_context.en: Biruni is perhaps history's first true comparativist. His Indica treats Hindu philosophy, science, and social custom with the same analytical rigor he applied to Islamic traditions — an astonishing methodological leap for the 11th century. His geodetic calculation of Earth's circumference (using Nandana Fort, modern Pakistan) yielded ~6,339.9 km for Earth's radius vs. the modern 6,371 km — a <1% error.
scholarly_context.tr: Bîrûnî, tarihin belki de ilk gerçek karşılaştırmacısıdır. Tahkîk, Hindu felsefesi, bilim ve toplumsal âdetlerini İslami geleneklere uyguladığı analitik titizlikle ele alır — 11. yüzyıl için şaşırtıcı bir metodolojik sıçrama. Nandana Kalesi'nden (modern Pakistan) yaptığı jeodezik hesap, Dünya yarıçapı için ~6.339,9 km verdi — modern 6.371 km'ye karşı <%1 hata.
scholarly_context.ar: البيروني أول مقارِن حقيقي في التاريخ. كتابه تحقيق ما للهند يعامل الفلسفة والعلم الهندوسيين بنفس الصرامة التحليلية. حسابه لمحيط الأرض من قلعة ناندانا أعطى خطأً أقل من ١٪

historiographical_note.en: E.S. Kennedy's (1973) reconstruction of Biruni's geodetic method confirmed its mathematical soundness. Sachau's 1888 translation of Indica introduced Biruni to Western scholarship but underplayed the comparative methodology that makes the work revolutionary.
historiographical_note.tr: E.S. Kennedy'nin (1973) Bîrûnî'nin jeodezik yönteminin yeniden inşası, matematiksel sağlamlığını doğruladı. Sachau'nun 1888 Tahkîk çevirisi Bîrûnî'yi Batı akademisine tanıttı ama eseri devrimci kılan karşılaştırmalı metodolojiyi küçümsedi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a single person being both a NASA scientist and a National Geographic anthropologist — measuring Earth's size with homemade instruments while also writing the most sympathetic cross-cultural study of a foreign civilization.
modern_parallel.tr: Tek bir kişinin hem NASA bilim insanı hem National Geographic antropolog olduğunu düşünün — el yapımı aletlerle Dünya'nın boyutunu ölçerken aynı zamanda yabancı bir medeniyetin en empatik kültürlerarası çalışmasını yazıyor.

inherited_from.what: Sanskrit astronomical texts (Surya Siddhanta), Hindu philosophy

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'البيروني، محمد بن أحمد', 'death_hijri': 440, 'page': 'VI/60', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو الريحان، الفيلسوف الفلكي، من أهل خوارزم. من أعظم العقول في تاريخ الإسلام. يعرف سبع لغات. ألّف نحو مائة وخمسين كتابًا', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Rayhan, philosopher-astronomer from Khwarezm. One of the greatest minds in Islamic history. Knew seven languages. Authored approximately 150 works.'}

full_name.en: Abu Ali al-Husayn ibn Abd Allah ibn Sina
full_name.tr: Ebû Alî el-Hüseyin b. Abdillâh İbn Sînâ
full_name.ar: أبو علي الحسين بن عبد الله ابن سينا

active_places.role: Youth, Samanid court physician at age 18
Most productive period under Ala al-Dawla

title.en: Al-Qānūn fī al-Ṭibb (The Canon of Medicine)

significance.en: Medical encyclopedia used as primary textbook in Europe until the 17th century
significance.tr: 17. yüzyıla kadar Avrupa'da temel ders kitabı olarak kullanılan tıp ansiklopedisi

significance.en: Largest philosophical encyclopedia by a single author in the medieval world
significance.tr: Ortaçağ dünyasında tek bir müellif tarafından yazılmış en büyük felsefe ansiklopedisi

key_contribution.en: Wrote the Canon of Medicine — the most influential medical textbook in history, used in European universities for 600 years. Described contagion, quarantine, and clinical trials
key_contribution.tr: Tıp tarihinin en etkili ders kitabı el-Kânûn'u yazdı — Avrupa üniversitelerinde 600 yıl kullanıldı. Bulaşıcılık, karantina ve klinik deneyleri anlattı
key_contribution.ar: كتب القانون في الطب — أكثر الكتب الطبية تأثيرًا في التاريخ، استُخدم في الجامعات الأوروبية ٦٠٠ عام

scholarly_context.en: Ibn Sina's Canon systematized Galenic and Hippocratic medicine while adding original clinical observations — contagion theory, meningitis differentiation, facial nerve anatomy, and the distinction between mediastinitis and pleurisy. His philosophical system (Neoplatonic emanationism adapted to Islamic theology) influenced Thomas Aquinas, Albertus Magnus, and the entire Latin Scholastic tradition.
scholarly_context.tr: İbn Sînâ'nın Kânûn'u Galenik ve Hipokrat tıbbını sistematize ederken özgün klinik gözlemler ekledi — bulaşıcılık teorisi, menenjit ayrımı, yüz siniri anatomisi ve mediastinit-plörezi ayrımı. Felsefi sistemi (İslam teolojisine uyarlanan Yeni-Platoncu sudûr teorisi) Thomas Aquinas, Albertus Magnus ve tüm Latin Skolastik geleneği etkiledi.
scholarly_context.ar: نظّم القانون الطب الجالينوسي مع إضافة ملاحظات سريرية أصيلة — نظرية العدوى والتمييز بين التهاب السحايا وتشريح العصب الوجهي. نظامه الفلسفي أثّر في توما الأكويني وجميع التقليد السكولاستيكي

historiographical_note.en: Gutas's Avicenna and the Aristotelian Tradition (1988, 2014) reframed Ibn Sina as an original philosophical thinker rather than a mere transmitter. The Canon's dominance in European medical education is documented by Siraisi (1987).
historiographical_note.tr: Gutas'ın Avicenna and the Aristotelian Tradition (1988, 2014) eseri İbn Sînâ'yı salt bir aktarıcı yerine özgün bir felsefi düşünür olarak yeniden çerçeveledi. Kânûn'un Avrupa tıp eğitimindeki hakimiyeti Siraisi (1987) tarafından belgelendi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine writing both the world's most-used medical textbook and its most-read philosophy encyclopedia — and having them remain the gold standard for 600 years. He was the WebMD and Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy of his era, combined.
modern_parallel.tr: Dünyanın en çok kullanılan tıp ders kitabını ve en çok okunan felsefe ansiklopedisini yazmayı — ve bunların 600 yıl altın standart kalmasını düşünün.

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن سينا، الحسين بن عبد الله', 'death_hijri': 428, 'page': 'VIII/240', 'entry_summary_ar': 'الرئيس، أبو علي، الفيلسوف. أشهر فلاسفة الإسلام. ولد قرب بخارى. ألّف نحو أربعمائة وخمسين كتابًا. أشهرها القانون والشفاء', 'entry_summary_en': "Al-Ra'is, Abu Ali, the Philosopher. Most famous of Islamic philosophers. Born near Bukhara. Authored approximately 450 works, most famous being the Canon and al-Shifa."}

full_name.en: Abu Bakr Muhammad ibn Zakariya al-Razi
full_name.tr: Ebû Bekr Muhammed b. Zekeriyyâ er-Râzî
full_name.ar: أبو بكر محمد بن زكريا الرازي

significance.en: Largest medical encyclopedia of the medieval world — 23+ volumes of clinical case notes
significance.tr: Ortaçağ dünyasının en büyük tıp ansiklopedisi — 23+ cilt klinik vaka notu

significance.en: First clinical distinction between smallpox and measles
significance.tr: Çiçek hastalığı ile kızamık arasındaki ilk klinik ayrım

key_contribution.en: First to clinically distinguish smallpox from measles, pioneer of experimental medicine, and defender of rational inquiry against dogmatic authority
key_contribution.tr: Çiçek hastalığını kızamıktan ilk klinik olarak ayıran, deneysel tıbbın öncüsü ve dogmatik otoriteye karşı akılcı sorgulamanın savunucusu
key_contribution.ar: أول من ميّز سريريًا بين الجدري والحصبة، ورائد الطب التجريبي

scholarly_context.en: Al-Razi championed clinical observation over textual authority — he is the first physician known to have conducted something resembling clinical trials (testing treatments on groups and comparing outcomes). His skepticism of Galen's humoral theory was centuries ahead of its time. The Hawi was translated into Latin as Continens in 1279 and became one of the most expensive books in medieval Europe.
scholarly_context.tr: Râzî, metinsel otoriteye karşı klinik gözlemi savundu — klinik deneylere benzer bir şey yapan (gruplar üzerinde tedavileri test edip sonuçları karşılaştıran) bilinen ilk hekimdir. Galen'in hılt teorisine şüpheciliği çağının yüzyıllar ilerisindeydi.
scholarly_context.ar: ناصر الرازي الملاحظة السريرية على سلطة النصوص — أول طبيب معروف أجرى ما يشبه التجارب السريرية. شكّه في نظرية الأخلاط لجالينوس سبق عصره بقرون

historiographical_note.en: Iskandar's 1962 study on Razi's philosophical works revealed a far more radical thinker than the purely medical figure portrayed in earlier Western scholarship. His theological skepticism, largely suppressed in Islamic biographical tradition, makes him one of the most controversial figures in Islamic intellectual history.
historiographical_note.tr: Iskandar'ın 1962 çalışması, Râzî'nin felsefi eserlerini inceleyerek önceki Batı akademisinde tasvir edilen salt tıbbi figürden çok daha radikal bir düşünürü ortaya çıkardı.

modern_parallel.en: A hospital director who compiled the Mayo Clinic's case database by hand, pioneered randomized trials, and publicly challenged the medical establishment — all in the 9th century.
modern_parallel.tr: Mayo Clinic'in vaka veritabanını elle derleyen, randomize deneylere öncülük eden ve tıbbi otoriteyi alenen eleştiren bir hastane müdürü — hepsi 9. yüzyılda.

inherited_from.what: Sushruta's surgical techniques via Barmakid translations

transmitted_to.what: Hawi translated to Latin as Continens for Charles of Anjou
Canon built upon Razi's clinical methodology

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الرازي، محمد بن زكريا', 'death_hijri': 313, 'page': 'VI/130', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو بكر، فيلسوف وطبيب. من أهل الري. من أعظم أطباء الإسلام. ألّف مائتي كتاب. الحاوي أكبر موسوعة طبية في القرون الوسطى', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Bakr, philosopher and physician from Rayy. One of the greatest physicians of Islam. Authored 200 works. Al-Hawi is the largest medieval medical encyclopedia.'}

full_name.en: Abu Musa Jabir ibn Hayyan al-Azdi
full_name.tr: Ebû Mûsâ Câbir b. Hayyân el-Ezdî
full_name.ar: أبو موسى جابر بن حيان الأزدي

significance.en: Systematic classification of chemical substances and processes
significance.tr: Kimyasal maddelerin ve süreçlerin sistematik sınıflandırılması

significance.en: 70 treatises on practical laboratory techniques
significance.tr: Pratik laboratuvar teknikleri üzerine 70 risale

key_contribution.en: Father of chemistry — invented distillation, crystallization, and the alembic. Words like 'alkali', 'alchemy', and 'elixir' derive from his Arabic terminology
key_contribution.tr: Kimyanın babası — damıtma, kristalizasyon ve imbik icat etti. 'Alkali', 'alchemy' ve 'elixir' kelimeleri onun Arapça terminolojisinden gelir
key_contribution.ar: أبو الكيمياء — اخترع التقطير والتبلور والإنبيق

scholarly_context.en: The 'Jabir corpus' — over 3,000 treatises attributed to him — is likely the work of an Ismaili school over two centuries. Regardless of individual authorship, the corpus introduced systematic experimentation to alchemy: controlled apparatus (alembic, retort), reproducible procedures, and quantitative measurements. It transformed alchemy from mystical speculation into proto-chemistry.
scholarly_context.tr: Ona atfedilen 3.000'den fazla risaleden oluşan 'Câbir külliyatı' muhtemelen iki yüzyıl boyunca bir İsmailî okulun eseridir. Bireysel yazarlık ne olursa olsun, külliyat simyaya sistematik deneyciliği getirdi: kontrollü düzenek, tekrarlanabilir prosedürler ve nicel ölçümler.
scholarly_context.ar: مجموع الجابري — أكثر من ٣,٠٠٠ رسالة — قدّم التجريب المنهجي للخيمياء: أجهزة مضبوطة وإجراءات قابلة للتكرار وقياسات كمّية. حوّل الخيمياء من تأمل صوفي إلى كيمياء أولية

historiographical_note.en: Kraus (1942-43) argued that most of the Jabirian corpus was pseudepigraphical, produced by Ismaili circles in the 9th-10th centuries. Newman's later work (2004) partly rehabilitated the historical Jabir. The question remains one of the most debated in Islamic science historiography.
historiographical_note.tr: Kraus (1942-43), Câbirci külliyatın çoğunun sahte olduğunu, 9-10. yüzyıl İsmailî çevrelerince üretildiğini savundu. Newman'ın (2004) çalışması tarihsel Câbir'i kısmen rehabilite etti.

modern_parallel.en: Think of him as the inventor of the laboratory itself — the beakers, the distillation columns, the crystallization dishes. Before Jabir, 'chemistry' was cooking with hope. After Jabir, it was science with glassware.
modern_parallel.tr: Onu laboratuvarın kendisinin mucidi olarak düşünün — cam kaplar, damıtma kolonları, kristalizasyon kapları. Câbir'den önce 'kimya' umutla yapılan aşçılıktı. Câbir'den sonra cam malzemeyle yapılan bilim oldu.

transmitted_to.what: First Latin translation of Kitab al-Kimya (Liber de Compositione Alchimiae)
Iatrochemistry built on Jabirian pharmacological chemistry

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'جابر بن حيان الأزدي', 'death_hijri': 200, 'page': 'II/103', 'entry_summary_ar': 'الكوفي، أبو موسى، كيميائي. اشتهر بالكيمياء والصنعة. تُنسب إليه مئات الرسائل. يُعدّ مؤسس علم الكيمياء عند المسلمين', 'entry_summary_en': 'From Kufa, Abu Musa, chemist. Famous for chemistry and craftsmanship. Hundreds of treatises attributed to him. Considered the founder of chemistry among Muslims.'}

full_name.en: Badi al-Zaman Abu al-Izz ibn Ismail al-Jazari
full_name.tr: Bedîüzzaman Ebü'l-İz İsmâil b. er-Rezzâz el-Cezerî
full_name.ar: بديع الزمان أبو العز إسماعيل بن الرزاز الجزري

active_places.role: Chief engineer to Artuqid court for 25 years

title.en: Al-Jāmiʿ bayn al-ʿIlm wa-l-ʿAmal al-Nāfiʿ fī Ṣināʿat al-Ḥiyal
title.tr: el-Câmi beyne'l-İlm ve'l-Amel en-Nâfi fî Sınâati'l-Hiyel
title.ar: الجامع بين العلم والعمل النافع في صناعة الحيل

significance.en: 50+ mechanical devices with detailed engineering drawings — includes the first programmable automaton and crankshaft mechanism
significance.tr: Ayrıntılı mühendislik çizimleriyle 50+ mekanik cihaz — ilk programlanabilir otomat ve krank mili mekanizmasını içerir

key_contribution.en: Father of robotics — designed the first programmable automaton (a musical boat with mechanical musicians) and invented the crankshaft, a mechanism that powers every car engine today
key_contribution.tr: Robotiğin babası — ilk programlanabilir otomatı (mekanik müzisyenli tekne) tasarladı ve bugün her araba motoruna güç veren krank milini icat etti
key_contribution.ar: أبو الروبوتات — صمّم أول إنسان آلي قابل للبرمجة واخترع عمود المرفق

scholarly_context.en: Jazari's Book of Ingenious Mechanical Devices represents the pinnacle of Islamic mechanical engineering. His Elephant Clock synthesized Indian, Chinese, Greek, Egyptian, and Arab water-clock traditions into a single mechanism — a deliberate statement of civilizational synthesis. His use of segmental gears, camshafts, and programmable cams predates European equivalents by centuries.
scholarly_context.tr: Cezerî'nin Kitâbü'l-Hiyel eseri, İslam mekanik mühendisliğinin zirvesini temsil eder. Fil Saati, Hint, Çin, Yunan, Mısır ve Arap su saati geleneklerini kasıtlı bir medeniyet sentezi olarak tek bir mekanizmada birleştirdi.
scholarly_context.ar: كتاب الحيل للجزري يمثل ذروة الهندسة الميكانيكية الإسلامية. ساعة الفيل جمعت تقاليد ست حضارات. استخدامه للتروس القطعية والكامات والأذرع المبرمجة سبق أوروبا بقرون

historiographical_note.en: Donald Hill's 1974 translation and critical edition revealed Jazari's engineering sophistication to Western scholarship. The 2017 Istanbul exhibition drew unprecedented public attention. Earlier Western histories of technology (e.g., Singer 1954) almost entirely omitted Islamic mechanical engineering.
historiographical_note.tr: Donald Hill'in 1974 çevirisi ve kritik edisyonu Cezerî'nin mühendislik sofistikasyonunu Batı akademisine tanıttı. Önceki Batı teknoloji tarihleri İslam mekanik mühendisliğini neredeyse tamamen ihmal etmişti.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine combining the creativity of a Pixar animator with the precision of a Tesla engineer — then imagine doing it 800 years before electricity existed.
modern_parallel.tr: Bir Pixar animatörünün yaratıcılığını bir Tesla mühendisinin hassasiyetiyle birleştirmeyi düşünün — sonra bunu elektrik icat edilmeden 800 yıl önce yapmayı.

inherited_from.what: Philo of Byzantium and Hero of Alexandria (pneumatics, automata)
Banu Musa brothers' Kitab al-Hiyal (Book of Ingenious Devices, 850)
Water-clock mechanisms via Silk Road trade

transmitted_to.what: Automata concepts (debated but plausible via manuscripts)
Direct manuscript tradition in Ottoman court workshops

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الجزري، إسماعيل بن الرزاز', 'death_hijri': 602, 'page': 'II/141', 'entry_summary_ar': 'بديع الزمان، مهندس ومخترع. خدم الأراتقة في ديار بكر. ألّف كتاب الحيل في الآلات الميكانيكية', 'entry_summary_en': 'Badi al-Zaman, engineer and inventor. Served the Artuqids in Diyarbakir. Authored the Book of Ingenious Mechanical Devices.'}

full_name.en: Abu Yusuf Yaqub ibn Ishaq al-Kindi
full_name.tr: Ebû Yûsuf Ya'kūb b. İshâk el-Kindî
full_name.ar: أبو يوسف يعقوب بن إسحاق الكندي

active_places.role: House of Wisdom philosopher; tutor to caliph's son

significance.en: First systematic attempt to harmonize Greek philosophy with Islamic revelation
significance.tr: Yunan felsefesini İslami vahiyle uyumlu hale getirmeye yönelik ilk sistematik girişim

significance.en: First known treatise on cryptanalysis — frequency analysis method
significance.tr: Bilinen ilk şifre çözümleme risalesi — frekans analizi yöntemi

key_contribution.en: The 'Philosopher of the Arabs' — first to systematize Greek philosophy in Arabic, and inventor of frequency analysis for breaking ciphers (the foundation of modern cryptography)
key_contribution.tr: 'Arap Filozofu' — Yunan felsefesini Arapçada ilk sistematize eden, ve şifre kırmak için frekans analizini icat eden (modern kriptografinin temeli)
key_contribution.ar: فيلسوف العرب — أول من نظّم الفلسفة اليونانية بالعربية، ومخترع تحليل التكرار لكسر الشفرات

scholarly_context.en: Kindi occupies a pivotal position as the first philosopher to write systematically in Arabic. He adapted Neoplatonic emanation theory to Islamic monotheism and established the philosophical vocabulary that Farabi, Ibn Sina, and Ibn Rushd would refine. His cryptanalysis treatise is the earliest known work to use letter-frequency analysis.
scholarly_context.tr: Kindî, Arapça'da sistematik olarak yazan ilk filozof olarak merkezi bir konuma sahiptir. Yeni-Platoncu sudûr teorisini İslam monoteizmine uyarladı ve Fârâbî, İbn Sînâ ve İbn Rüşd'ün rafine edeceği felsefi terminolojiyi kurdu.
scholarly_context.ar: الكندي أول فيلسوف كتب منهجيًا بالعربية. كيّف نظرية الفيض الأفلاطونية المحدثة مع التوحيد الإسلامي ووضع المصطلحات الفلسفية التي طوّرها الفارابي وابن سينا وابن رشد

historiographical_note.en: Adamson's Al-Kindi (2007) repositioned him from a minor transitional figure to a major original thinker. The cryptanalysis work, published by Mrayati et al. (2002), demonstrated Kindi's mathematical sophistication was previously underestimated.
historiographical_note.tr: Adamson'ın Al-Kindi (2007) eseri, onu küçük bir geçiş figüründen büyük bir özgün düşünüre yeniden konumlandırdı.

modern_parallel.en: The first person to successfully run both philosophy and the NSA — translating Aristotle by day and cracking enemy codes by night.
modern_parallel.tr: Hem felsefe hem NSA'yı başarıyla yürüten ilk kişi — gündüz Aristoteles çeviriyor, gece düşman şifrelerini kırıyor.

inherited_from.what: Aristotle (via Syriac translations), Plotinus (Theology of Aristotle)

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الكندي، يعقوب بن إسحاق', 'death_hijri': 260, 'page': 'VIII/195', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو يوسف، فيلسوف العرب. من ذرية كندة. عمل في بيت الحكمة. أول من فلسف بالعربية', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Yusuf, Philosopher of the Arabs. Of Kinda descent. Worked at the House of Wisdom. First to philosophize systematically in Arabic.'}

full_name.en: Wali al-Din Abu Zayd Abd al-Rahman ibn Muhammad ibn Khaldun
full_name.tr: Veliyyüddin Ebû Zeyd Abdurrahman b. Muhammed İbn Haldûn
full_name.ar: ولي الدين أبو زيد عبد الرحمن بن محمد ابن خلدون

significance.en: Founded sociology, historiography, and economics as systematic disciplines — described civilizational rise and fall in cyclical terms
significance.tr: Sosyoloji, tarihyazımı ve iktisadı sistematik disiplinler olarak kurdu — medeniyetlerin yükseliş ve çöküşünü döngüsel terimlerle anlattı

key_contribution.en: Founded sociology and historical science 500 years before Auguste Comte. His cyclical theory of civilizational rise and fall through asabiyyah (group cohesion) remains one of the most powerful frameworks in social science
key_contribution.tr: Sosyoloji ve tarih bilimini Auguste Comte'tan 500 yıl önce kurdu. Asabiyet (grup dayanışması) yoluyla medeniyetlerin yükseliş ve çöküşüne dair döngüsel teorisi, sosyal bilimlerin en güçlü çerçevelerinden biri olmaya devam ediyor
key_contribution.ar: أسّس علم الاجتماع قبل أوغست كونت بخمسة قرون. نظريته الدورية في صعود الحضارات وسقوطها عبر العصبية لا تزال من أقوى الأطر في العلوم الاجتماعية

scholarly_context.en: The Muqaddimah is unique in pre-modern thought: it applies empirical analysis to history, economics, and politics while explicitly rejecting supernatural causation. His theory of asabiyyah (group solidarity) describes how nomadic groups forge cohesion through hardship, conquer settled civilizations, then lose solidarity through luxury — repeating in ~4-generation cycles. He anticipated concepts later attributed to Vico, Montesquieu, Marx, and Toynbee.
scholarly_context.tr: Mukaddime, modern öncesi düşüncede benzersizdir: tarih, iktisat ve siyasete ampirik analiz uygularken doğaüstü nedenselliği açıkça reddeder. Asabiyet teorisi, göçebe grupların zorlukla dayanışma oluşturup yerleşik medeniyetleri fethedip sonra lüksle dayanışmayı kaybetmesini — ~4 kuşak döngüleriyle — anlatır.
scholarly_context.ar: المقدمة فريدة في الفكر ما قبل الحديث: تطبّق التحليل التجريبي على التاريخ والاقتصاد والسياسة مع رفض صريح للسببية الغيبية. نظرية العصبية تصف دورات بأربعة أجيال

historiographical_note.en: Franz Rosenthal's monumental 1958 translation of the Muqaddimah brought Ibn Khaldun into mainstream Western social science. Lacoste (1966) and Mahdi (1957) established the philosophical depth of his thought. The 'asabiyyah' concept has recently been adopted by cliodynamics (Peter Turchin, 2006).
historiographical_note.tr: Franz Rosenthal'ın anıtsal 1958 Mukaddime çevirisi İbn Haldûn'u Batı sosyal biliminin ana akımına taşıdı. 'Asabiyet' kavramı son zamanlarda kliyo-dinamikler (Peter Turchin, 2006) tarafından benimsendi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine someone writing both Marx's Capital and Toynbee's A Study of History — in a castle, in four months, in the 14th century. That's the Muqaddimah.
modern_parallel.tr: Birinin hem Marx'ın Kapital'ini hem Toynbee'nin Tarih Üzerine İnceleme'sini — bir kalede, dört ayda, 14. yüzyılda yazdığını düşünün. İşte Mukaddime budur.

inherited_from.what: Decades of court service across North Africa and Iberia

transmitted_to.what: Muqaddimah widely studied in Ottoman circles (Kâtip Çelebi, Naima)
First French translation brought cyclical theory to European attention
A Study of History explicitly credits Ibn Khaldun

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن خلدون، عبد الرحمن بن محمد', 'death_hijri': 808, 'page': 'III/330', 'entry_summary_ar': 'ولي الدين، المؤرخ الفيلسوف. ولد في تونس. مؤلف المقدمة التي أسّس بها علم العمران البشري', 'entry_summary_en': 'Wali al-Din, the historian-philosopher. Born in Tunis. Author of the Muqaddimah which founded the science of human civilization.'}

full_name.en: Moses ben Maimon (Rambam)
full_name.ar: أبو عمران موسى بن عبيد الله ميمون

active_places.role: Personal physician to Saladin's vizier; head of Jewish community

significance.en: Synthesis of Aristotelian philosophy with Jewish theology — written in Judaeo-Arabic
significance.tr: Aristoteles felsefesinin Yahudi teolojisiyle sentezi — Yahudi-Arapçası ile yazıldı

significance.en: Comprehensive codification of Jewish law — still authoritative today
significance.tr: Yahudi hukukunun kapsamlı kodifikasyonu — bugün hâlâ otoriter

key_contribution.en: Greatest medieval Jewish philosopher and physician — proved that Islamic, Jewish, and Christian intellectual traditions could fertilize each other. Personal physician to Saladin's court while leading Cairo's Jewish community
key_contribution.tr: Ortaçağın en büyük Yahudi filozofu ve hekimi — İslami, Yahudi ve Hristiyan entelektüel geleneklerinin birbirini besleyebileceğini kanıtladı
key_contribution.ar: أعظم فيلسوف وطبيب يهودي في العصور الوسطى — أثبت أن التقاليد الفكرية الإسلامية واليهودية والمسيحية يمكن أن تخصّب بعضها بعضًا

scholarly_context.en: Maimonides epitomizes the cross-pollination of Islamic civilization. Educated in Muslim Córdoba, trained under Muslim scholars in Fez, writing philosophy in Arabic for a Jewish audience, and serving a Muslim court in Cairo — his career is impossible to categorize within a single tradition. The Guide for the Perplexed, written in Judaeo-Arabic, synthesizes Farabi and Ibn Sina's philosophy with Talmudic reasoning.
scholarly_context.tr: Mûsâ b. Meymûn, İslam medeniyetinin çapraz tozlaşmasını temsil eder. Müslüman Kurtuba'da eğitim, Fas'ta Müslüman alimler altında öğrenim, Arapça'da felsefe yazımı, Kahire'de Müslüman saraya hizmet — kariyeri tek bir gelenek içinde sınıflandırılamaz.
scholarly_context.ar: موسى بن ميمون يجسّد التلاقح المتبادل للحضارة الإسلامية. تعلّم في قرطبة المسلمة وكتب الفلسفة بالعربية لجمهور يهودي وخدم بلاطًا مسلمًا في القاهرة

historiographical_note.en: Stroumsa's Maimonides in His World (2009) challenged the tendency to study Maimonides in isolation from his Islamic intellectual environment. The Cairo Geniza documents (over 300,000 fragments) provide unparalleled archival evidence of his daily life and medical practice.
historiographical_note.tr: Stroumsa'nın Maimonides in His World (2009) eseri, Mûsâ b. Meymûn'u İslami entelektüel çevresinden izole olarak çalışma eğilimini sorguladı.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine being simultaneously the Chief Rabbi of your community, a top surgeon at the local hospital, and a bestselling philosopher — while writing in a language shared by three faiths.
modern_parallel.tr: Aynı anda cemaatinizin baş hahamı, yerel hastanenin baş cerrahı ve bestseller bir filozof olduğunuzu düşünün — üç inancın paylaştığı bir dilde yazarken.

inherited_from.what: Farabi and Ibn Sina's Aristotelian-Neoplatonic synthesis
Aristotle (via Arabic translations by Hunayn ibn Ishaq)

transmitted_to.what: Persecution and the Art of Writing reinterprets Maimonides

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن ميمون، موسى', 'death_hijri': 601, 'page': 'VII/327', 'entry_summary_ar': 'فيلسوف يهودي، طبيب. ولد في قرطبة. خدم في بلاط صلاح الدين. ألّف دلالة الحائرين بالعربية', 'entry_summary_en': "Jewish philosopher and physician. Born in Córdoba. Served at Saladin's court. Wrote the Guide for the Perplexed in Arabic."}

full_name.en: Muhammad, Ahmad, and al-Hasan ibn Musa ibn Shakir
full_name.tr: Muhammed, Ahmed ve Hasan b. Mûsâ b. Şâkir
full_name.ar: محمد وأحمد والحسن بنو موسى بن شاكر

active_places.role: House of Wisdom engineers and patrons

significance.en: 100+ mechanical devices including automatic controls, valves, and a programmable musical automaton
significance.tr: Otomatik kontroller, valflar ve programlanabilir müzik otomatı dahil 100+ mekanik cihaz

title.en: Kitāb Maʿrifat Masāḥat al-Ashkāl (On the Measurement of Figures)

significance.en: Advanced geometric treatise that influenced later mathematicians including Tusi
significance.tr: Tûsî dahil sonraki matematikçileri etkileyen ileri geometri risalesi

key_contribution.en: Three brothers who ran a one-family R&D lab at the House of Wisdom — 100+ inventions including the world's first automatic flute (a programmable musical automaton, 700 years before European music boxes)
key_contribution.tr: Beytü'l-Hikme'de tek aileli bir Ar-Ge laboratuvarı işleten üç kardeş — dünyanın ilk otomatik flütü dahil 100+ icat (Avrupa müzik kutularından 700 yıl önce programlanabilir müzik otomatı)
key_contribution.ar: ثلاثة إخوة أداروا مختبرًا عائليًا في بيت الحكمة — أكثر من ١٠٠ اختراع

scholarly_context.en: The Banu Musa brothers were simultaneously inventors, mathematicians, and translation patrons. They personally funded Hunayn ibn Ishaq's translation program, spending 500 dinars per month — making them the venture capitalists of 9th-century science. Their Kitab al-Hiyal contains the earliest known examples of automatic control systems.
scholarly_context.tr: Benû Mûsâ kardeşler aynı anda mucit, matematikçi ve çeviri hamileriydi. Huneyn b. İshak'ın çeviri programını aylık 500 dinar harcayarak bizzat finanse ettiler — 9. yüzyıl biliminin girişim sermayecileri.
scholarly_context.ar: بنو موسى كانوا مخترعين ورياضيين ورعاة ترجمة في آن واحد. موّلوا برنامج حنين بن إسحاق بخمسمائة دينار شهريًا — رأسماليو مغامرون لعلم القرن التاسع

historiographical_note.en: Hill's 1979 translation of Kitab al-Hiyal demonstrated that the mechanical sophistication of the Banu Musa surpassed that of Hero of Alexandria. Their role as translation patrons was documented by Gutas (1998).
historiographical_note.tr: Hill'in 1979 çevirisinde Benû Mûsâ'nın mekanik sofistikasyonunun İskenderiyeli Heron'u aştığı gösterildi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine three brothers running a Silicon Valley startup, a philanthropic foundation, and a Princeton research lab — all at once, in the 9th century.
modern_parallel.tr: Üç kardeşin aynı anda bir Silikon Vadisi girişimi, bir hayırseverlik vakfı ve bir Princeton araştırma laboratuvarı işlettiğini düşünün — 9. yüzyılda.

inherited_from.what: Hero of Alexandria's Pneumatica and Automata

transmitted_to.what: Kitab al-Hiyal directly inspired Jazari's mechanical devices
Automatic control concepts via Andalusian manuscripts

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'بنو موسى بن شاكر', 'death_hijri': 259, 'page': 'II/70', 'entry_summary_ar': 'ثلاثة إخوة: محمد وأحمد والحسن. عملوا في بيت الحكمة. اشتهروا بالهندسة والرياضيات وترعية حركة الترجمة', 'entry_summary_en': 'Three brothers: Muhammad, Ahmad and al-Hasan. Worked at the House of Wisdom. Famous for engineering, mathematics, and patronizing the translation movement.'}

full_name.en: Abu Abdullah Muhammad ibn Ismail al-Bukhari
full_name.tr: Ebû Abdillâh Muhammed b. İsmâîl el-Buhârî
full_name.ar: أبو عبد الله محمد بن إسماعيل البخاري

active_places.role: Hadith study with Ahmad ibn Hanbal's circle

significance.en: Most authoritative hadith collection in Sunni Islam — selected 7,275 from 600,000 candidates using rigorous chain-of-narration verification
significance.tr: Sünni İslam'ın en muteber hadis koleksiyonu — 600.000 adaydan titiz isnad doğrulamasıyla 7.275'ini seçti

key_contribution.en: Developed the most rigorous source-verification methodology of the pre-modern world — examining 600,000 traditions and accepting only 7,275 as authentic. His 'science of men' (ilm al-rijal) is the world's first systematic source criticism
key_contribution.tr: Modern öncesi dünyanın en titiz kaynak doğrulama metodolojisini geliştirdi — 600.000 rivayeti inceleyip yalnızca 7.275'ini sahih kabul etti. 'İlmü'r-ricâl' (kişiler ilmi) dünyanın ilk sistematik kaynak eleştirisidir
key_contribution.ar: طوّر أدق منهجية للتحقق من المصادر في العالم ما قبل الحديث — فحص ٦٠٠ ألف رواية وقبل ٧,٢٧٥ منها فقط

scholarly_context.en: Bukhari's methodology — verifying every link in a chain of oral transmission (isnad), investigating narrators' character, memory, and contemporaneity — constitutes the world's earliest systematic approach to source criticism. The isnad-based system predates European historical source criticism (Ranke, 19th c.) by a millennium. His 16-year journey across the Islamic world to collect and verify hadith is itself an extraordinary feat of scholarly dedication.
scholarly_context.tr: Buhârî'nin metodolojisi — sözlü aktarım zincirindeki her halkayı doğrulama (isnad), râvilerin karakteri, hafızası ve çağdaşlığını araştırma — dünyanın ilk sistematik kaynak eleştirisi yaklaşımını oluşturur. İsnad sistemi Avrupa'daki tarihsel kaynak eleştirisini (Ranke, 19. yy.) bin yıl önceleler.
scholarly_context.ar: منهجية البخاري — التحقق من كل حلقة في سلسلة الرواية الشفهية — تشكّل أقدم منهج منظم لنقد المصادر في العالم. نظام الإسناد سبق النقد التاريخي الأوروبي بألفية

historiographical_note.en: Juynboll's Muslim Tradition (1983) questioned the historicity of many isnads but acknowledged the methodological sophistication. More recently, Brown's Canonization of al-Bukhari and Muslim (2007) traced how the Sahih achieved its supreme status in Sunni tradition.
historiographical_note.tr: Juynboll'un Muslim Tradition (1983) çalışması birçok isnadın tarihselliğini sorguladı ama metodolojik sofistikasyonu kabul etti. Daha yakın zamanda Brown (2007) Sahîh'in Sünni gelenekteki üstün statüsünü nasıl kazandığını izledi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a data scientist who traveled 16 years to personally interview every source, verify every chain of custody, and filter a dataset of 600,000 entries down to 7,275 — without a computer. That's peer review on a civilizational scale.
modern_parallel.tr: 16 yıl boyunca her kaynağı bizzat mülakat için seyahat eden, her emanet zincirini doğrulayan ve 600.000 kayıtlık veri setini bilgisayar olmadan 7.275'e filtreleyen bir veri bilimci düşünün.

inherited_from.what: Earlier hadith collections (Malik's Muwatta, Ibn Hanbal's Musnad)
Isnad methodology developed by scholars of Medina and Kufa

transmitted_to.what: Sahih Muslim followed Bukhari's rigorous methodology
Bukhari's criteria became the gold standard for authentication
Ranke's Quellenkritik parallels isnad methodology (independent development)

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'البخاري، محمد بن إسماعيل', 'death_hijri': 256, 'page': 'VI/34', 'entry_summary_ar': 'إمام أهل الحديث، صاحب الجامع الصحيح. ولد في بخارى. رحل في طلب الحديث ستة عشر عامًا', 'entry_summary_en': 'Imam of hadith scholars, compiler of al-Jami al-Sahih. Born in Bukhara. Traveled sixteen years in pursuit of hadith.'}

full_name.en: Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Nafi Ziryab
full_name.ar: أبو الحسن علي بن نافع زرياب

key_contribution.en: Invented the three-course meal, seasonal fashion, toothpaste, and the five-string oud — single-handedly transformed European social customs from Baghdad to Andalusia
key_contribution.tr: Üç çeşit yemek düzenini, mevsimlik modayı, diş macununu ve beş telli udu icat etti — Bağdat'tan Endülüs'e Avrupa sosyal adetlerini tek başına dönüştürdü
key_contribution.ar: اخترع الوجبة ذات الثلاثة أطباق والموضة الموسمية ومعجون الأسنان والعود ذا الخمسة أوتار

scholarly_context.en: Ziryab represents the cultural dimension of Islamic civilization's impact on Europe. His innovations were not technological but social: dining etiquette, seasonal wardrobe changes, personal hygiene standards, and musical theory. He established a conservatory in Córdoba that trained generations of musicians and introduced the 24 Andalusian nubat — the classical music system that influenced troubadour tradition.
scholarly_context.tr: Ziryâb, İslam medeniyetinin Avrupa üzerindeki kültürel boyutunu temsil eder. Yenilikleri teknolojik değil sosyaldi: yemek adabı, mevsimlik gardırop değişiklikleri, kişisel hijyen standartları ve müzik teorisi.
scholarly_context.ar: زرياب يمثل البعد الثقافي لتأثير الحضارة الإسلامية على أوروبا. ابتكاراته اجتماعية لا تكنولوجية: آداب المائدة والأزياء الموسمية ومعايير النظافة الشخصية ونظرية الموسيقى

historiographical_note.en: The historical Ziryab is difficult to separate from legend, as most sources are centuries later. Al-Maqqari's Nafh al-Tib (17th c.) is the fullest account. Reynolds (2009) attempted to reconstruct the historical core from earlier fragments.
historiographical_note.tr: Tarihsel Ziryâb'ı efsaneden ayırmak zordur, çünkü kaynakların çoğu yüzyıllar sonrasıdır. el-Makkarî'nin Nefhu't-Tîb'i (17. yy.) en kapsamlı anlatımdır.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a single person being simultaneously Coco Chanel (fashion), Gordon Ramsay (dining), and Quincy Jones (music) — and having their innovations define an entire continent's culture for centuries.
modern_parallel.tr: Tek bir kişinin aynı anda Coco Chanel (moda), Gordon Ramsay (yemek) ve Quincy Jones (müzik) olmasını düşünün — ve yeniliklerinin yüzyıllar boyunca kıtanın kültürünü tanımlamasını.

inherited_from.what: Ishaq al-Mawsili's musical theory, Abbasid court culture

transmitted_to.what: Musical forms and lyric poetry conventions
Three-course meal structure and table etiquette

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'زرياب، علي بن نافع', 'death_hijri': 243, 'page': 'III/50', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو الحسن، موسيقي ومبتكر. انتقل من بغداد إلى قرطبة. أثّر في الذوق الأندلسي تأثيرًا بالغًا', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu al-Hasan, musician and innovator. Migrated from Baghdad to Córdoba. Profoundly influenced Andalusian taste and culture.'}

full_name.en: Shams al-Din Abu Abdullah Muhammad ibn Battuta
full_name.tr: Şemseddin Ebû Abdillâh Muhammed İbn Battûta
full_name.ar: شمس الدين أبو عبد الله محمد ابن بطوطة

active_places.role: Judge and ambassador for Sultan Muhammad Tughluq

title.en: Rihla (A Gift to Those Who Contemplate the Wonders of Cities)
title.ar: تحفة النظار في غرائب الأمصار وعجائب الأسفار

significance.en: Record of 75,000 miles of travel across 44 countries over 30 years
significance.tr: 30 yılda 44 ülkede 75.000 millik seyahatin kaydı

key_contribution.en: Traveled 75,000 miles across 44 countries in 30 years — three times the distance of Marco Polo. His Rihla is the most complete eyewitness account of the medieval Islamic world
key_contribution.tr: 30 yılda 44 ülkede 75.000 mil yol aldı — Marco Polo'nun üç katı mesafe. Rihle'si ortaçağ İslam dünyasının en eksiksiz görgü tanığı anlatısıdır
key_contribution.ar: قطع ٧٥ ألف ميل عبر ٤٤ بلدًا في ٣٠ عامًا — ثلاثة أضعاف مسافة ماركو بولو

scholarly_context.en: The Rihla is far more than a travelogue — it is the most detailed ethnographic survey of the 14th-century Islamic world, documenting legal systems, trade networks, social customs, and political structures from Morocco to China. Where Marco Polo focused on exotica and commerce, Ibn Battuta provided institutional analysis.
scholarly_context.tr: Rihle salt bir seyahatname değildir — Fas'tan Çin'e hukuk sistemleri, ticaret ağları, sosyal adetler ve siyasi yapıları belgeleyen 14. yüzyıl İslam dünyasının en ayrıntılı etnografik araştırmasıdır.
scholarly_context.ar: الرحلة أكثر من سجل سفر — إنها أكثر مسح إثنوغرافي تفصيلي للعالم الإسلامي في القرن الرابع عشر، توثّق الأنظمة القانونية وشبكات التجارة والأعراف الاجتماعية

historiographical_note.en: Gibb's multi-volume Hakluyt Society translation (1958–2000) established the Rihla's historical reliability. Dunn's Adventures of Ibn Battuta (1986) demonstrated that modern archaeology confirms the vast majority of his accounts, contradicting centuries of European skepticism.
historiographical_note.tr: Gibb'in çok ciltli Hakluyt Society çevirisi (1958–2000) Rihle'nin tarihsel güvenilirliğini kurdu. Dunn (1986) modern arkeolojinin anlatısının büyük çoğunluğunu doğruladığını gösterdi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a travel blogger visiting 44 countries over 30 years without a passport, phone, or GPS — and having archaeologists confirm every blog post 700 years later.
modern_parallel.tr: Pasaport, telefon veya GPS olmadan 30 yılda 44 ülkeyi ziyaret eden ve 700 yıl sonra arkeologların her blog gönderisini doğruladığı bir seyahat blogcusu düşünün.

inherited_from.what: Rihla (travel writing) tradition established by Ibn Jubayr
Dar al-Islam infrastructure — madrasas, waqf, qadi system

transmitted_to.what: Compiled and edited the Rihla from Ibn Battuta's dictation

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن بطوطة، محمد بن عبد الله', 'death_hijri': 779, 'page': 'II/60', 'entry_summary_ar': 'شمس الدين، الرحّالة. ولد في طنجة. طاف العالم الإسلامي وما وراءه. ألّف تحفة النظار', 'entry_summary_en': 'Shams al-Din, the traveler. Born in Tangier. Traversed the Islamic world and beyond. Authored Tuhfat al-Nuzzar.'}

full_name.en: Abu Zayd Hunayn ibn Ishaq al-Ibadi
full_name.tr: Ebû Zeyd Huneyn b. İshâk el-İbâdî
full_name.ar: أبو زيد حنين بن إسحاق العبادي

active_places.role: Chief translator at House of Wisdom

significance.en: Systematic translation of the entire Galenic medical corpus from Greek to Arabic — many survive only in his Arabic versions
significance.tr: Tüm Galenik tıp külliyatının Yunancadan Arapçaya sistematik çevirisi — birçoğu yalnızca onun Arapça versiyonlarında günümüze ulaştı

title.en: Kitāb al-ʿAshr Maqālāt fī al-ʿAyn (Ten Treatises on the Eye)

significance.en: Earliest systematic ophthalmology textbook
significance.tr: Bilinen en eski sistematik göz hastalıkları ders kitabı

key_contribution.en: Greatest translator of the ancient world — personally translated 129 works of Galen from Greek to Arabic. Without Hunayn, much of Greek medical and philosophical knowledge would have been permanently lost
key_contribution.tr: Antik dünyanın en büyük çevirmeni — Galen'in 129 eserini bizzat Yunancadan Arapçaya çevirdi. Huneyn olmasaydı, Yunan tıbbi ve felsefi bilgisinin çoğu kalıcı olarak kaybolacaktı
key_contribution.ar: أعظم مترجم في العالم القديم — ترجم شخصيًا ١٢٩ عملًا لجالينوس من اليونانية إلى العربية

scholarly_context.en: Hunayn developed a revolutionary translation methodology: he collated multiple Greek manuscripts, produced a Syriac intermediate version, then rendered the final Arabic. This philological rigor means his translations are sometimes more reliable than surviving Greek originals. He was a Nestorian Christian — living proof that the translation movement was a multi-faith enterprise.
scholarly_context.tr: Huneyn devrimci bir çeviri metodolojisi geliştirdi: birden fazla Yunanca yazmayı karşılaştırdı, Süryanice ara versiyon üretti, sonra nihai Arapçayı oluşturdu. Bu filolojik titizlik, çevirilerinin bazen mevcut Yunanca orijinallerden daha güvenilir olması anlamına gelir.
scholarly_context.ar: طوّر حنين منهجية ترجمة ثورية: مقارنة مخطوطات يونانية متعددة ثم نسخة سريانية وسيطة ثم عربية نهائية. هذه الدقة تعني أن ترجماته أحيانًا أوثق من الأصول اليونانية الباقية

historiographical_note.en: Bergsträsser's (1925, 1932) recovery of Hunayn's own catalogue (Risala) revolutionized our understanding of the Greco-Arabic translation movement. Gutas's Greek Thought, Arabic Culture (1998) placed Hunayn at the center of the most consequential knowledge-transfer event before the printing press.
historiographical_note.tr: Bergsträsser'in (1925, 1932) Huneyn'in kendi kataloğunun (Risâle) keşfi, Yunan-Arap çeviri hareketi anlayışımızı devrimleştirdi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a single person translating the entire medical library of Johns Hopkins into another language — and doing it so well that scholars 1,200 years later prefer his translations to the originals.
modern_parallel.tr: Tek bir kişinin Johns Hopkins'in tüm tıp kütüphanesini başka bir dile çevirdiğini düşünün — ve bunu o kadar iyi yapmasını ki 1.200 yıl sonra bile alimler onun çevirilerini orijinallere tercih etsin.

inherited_from.what: Galen, Hippocrates, Aristotle, Plato, Dioscorides — entire Greek scientific-philosophical corpus
Earlier partial translations by Sergius of Resh'aina (6th c.)

transmitted_to.what: Razi's medicine built on Hunayn's Galenic translations
Canon of Medicine synthesized Hunayn's translated corpus
Arabic-to-Latin translations of Hunayn's Galenic corpus

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'حنين بن إسحاق العبادي', 'death_hijri': 260, 'page': 'II/310', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو زيد، طبيب ومترجم نسطوري. أعظم مترجمي العصر العباسي. ترجم كتب جالينوس وأبقراط وغيرهما', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Zayd, Nestorian physician and translator. Greatest translator of the Abbasid era. Translated the works of Galen, Hippocrates and others.'}

full_name.en: Abu al-Abbas Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Kathir al-Farghani
full_name.ar: أبو العباس أحمد بن محمد بن كثير الفرغاني

active_places.role: House of Wisdom astronomer under al-Ma'mun

significance.en: Simplified Ptolemy's Almagest; became the standard astronomy textbook for centuries in both Islamic and European worlds
significance.tr: Batlamyus'un Almagest'ini sadeleştirdi; hem İslam hem Avrupa dünyalarında yüzyıllar boyunca standart astronomi ders kitabı oldu

key_contribution.en: His simplified Ptolemy was the astronomy textbook that taught both the Islamic and European worlds for centuries — Columbus used Farghani's Earth-circumference calculation (underestimated) to justify his voyage
key_contribution.tr: Sadeleştirilmiş Batlamyus'u yüzyıllar boyunca hem İslam hem Avrupa dünyalarına astronomiyi öğreten ders kitabıydı — Kolomb, Fergânî'nin (düşük hesaplanmış) Dünya çevresi hesabını seyahatini gerekçelendirmek için kullandı
key_contribution.ar: كتابه المبسّط لبطليموس كان الكتاب المدرسي في الفلك الذي علّم العالمين الإسلامي والأوروبي لقرون

scholarly_context.en: Farghani's Elements made the Almagest accessible to non-specialists and added original corrections to Ptolemy's parameters. His value for Earth's circumference (20,400 miles) was more accurate than Ptolemy's but became Columbus's justification for westward sailing — Columbus didn't realize Farghani used Arabic miles (1.93 km), not Italian miles (1.48 km), causing him to underestimate the Atlantic crossing.
scholarly_context.tr: Fergânî'nin Cevâmiu eseri Almagest'i uzman olmayanlara erişilebilir kıldı. Dünya çevresi değeri Batlamyus'tan daha doğruydu ama Kolomb'un batıya yelken açmasının gerekçesi oldu — Kolomb, Fergânî'nin İtalyan mili değil Arap mili kullandığını fark etmedi.
scholarly_context.ar: جوامع الفرغاني جعلت المجسطي في متناول غير المتخصصين. قيمته لمحيط الأرض صارت مبرر كولومبوس للإبحار غربًا — لكنه لم يدرك أن الفرغاني استخدم الميل العربي لا الإيطالي

historiographical_note.en: The Columbus-Farghani connection was documented by Nunn (1924). Farghani's role as the 'great popularizer' of Ptolemaic astronomy was recognized by Neugebauer (1975) and Saliba (2007).
historiographical_note.tr: Kolomb-Fergânî bağlantısı Nunn (1924) tarafından belgelendi. Fergânî'nin Batlamyusçu astronominin 'büyük popülerleştiricisi' rolü Neugebauer (1975) ve Saliba (2007) tarafından kabul edildi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine writing a textbook so influential that a navigator 600 years later misreads one unit in it — and accidentally discovers a continent.
modern_parallel.tr: O kadar etkili bir ders kitabı yazmayı düşünün ki 600 yıl sonra bir denizci içindeki bir birimi yanlış okur — ve kazara bir kıta keşfeder.

transmitted_to.what: Latin translation of Elements (Liber de aggregationibus)
Used Farghani's circumference value (misread units) to justify westward voyage

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الفرغاني، أحمد بن محمد', 'death_hijri': 247, 'page': 'I/221', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو العباس، فلكي. من فرغانة. عمل في بغداد. اشتهر بكتابه في أصول علم النجوم', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu al-Abbas, astronomer from Ferghana. Worked in Baghdad. Famous for his book on the elements of astronomy.'}

full_name.en: Abu Abdullah Muhammad ibn Jabir ibn Sinan al-Battani
full_name.tr: Ebû Abdillâh Muhammed b. Câbir b. Sinân el-Battânî
full_name.ar: أبو عبد الله محمد بن جابر بن سنان البتاني

significance.en: Corrected Ptolemy's astronomical tables with 42 years of original observations — introduced trigonometric methods to astronomy
significance.tr: Batlamyus'un astronomik tablolarını 42 yıllık özgün gözlemlerle düzeltti — trigonometrik yöntemleri astronomiye tanıttı

key_contribution.en: The 'Ptolemy of the Arabs' — corrected the length of the year to within 2 minutes of the modern value, introduced trigonometric methods (replacing Ptolemy's geometric chord tables), and measured the precession of the equinoxes
key_contribution.tr: 'Arapların Batlamyus'u' — yıl uzunluğunu modern değerin 2 dakikası içinde düzeltti, trigonometrik yöntemleri tanıttı ve ekinoksların presesyonunu ölçtü
key_contribution.ar: بطليموس العرب — صحّح طول السنة بدقة دقيقتين عن القيمة الحديثة

scholarly_context.en: Battani's 42-year observation program at Raqqa was the longest systematic astronomical campaign of the medieval world. He replaced Ptolemy's geometric chord methods with sine and tangent functions, making astronomical calculation vastly more efficient. Copernicus cited Battani 23 times in De Revolutionibus.
scholarly_context.tr: Battânî'nin Rakka'daki 42 yıllık gözlem programı ortaçağ dünyasının en uzun sistematik astronomik kampanyasıydı. Batlamyus'un geometrik kiriş yöntemlerini sinüs ve tanjant fonksiyonlarıyla değiştirdi. Kopernik, De Revolutionibus'da Battânî'yi 23 kez alıntıladı.
scholarly_context.ar: برنامج البتاني الرصدي (٤٢ عامًا) في الرقة كان الأطول في العالم الوسيط. استبدل أساليب الأوتار ببدوال الجيب والظل. استشهد كوبرنيكوس بالبتاني ٢٣ مرة

historiographical_note.en: Nallino's critical edition (1899-1907) of the Zij remains the standard. Battani was one of the few Islamic astronomers acknowledged by Copernicus by name, demonstrating direct transmission via the Toledo translation school.
historiographical_note.tr: Nallino'nun kritik edisyonu (1899-1907) hâlâ standarttır. Battânî, Kopernik tarafından adıyla anılan birkaç İslam astronomlarından biriydi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine staring at the sky every night for 42 years, taking notes by hand, and producing data so accurate that the next breakthrough — Copernicus — wouldn't come for 600 years.
modern_parallel.tr: 42 yıl boyunca her gece gökyüzüne bakıp elle not tutarak öyle doğru veriler üretmeyi düşünün ki bir sonraki atılım — Kopernik — 600 yıl gelmeyecek.

inherited_from.what: Ma'mun-era astronomical observations at Baghdad and Damascus

transmitted_to.what: Used Battani's star positions as baseline for comparison

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'البتاني، محمد بن جابر', 'death_hijri': 317, 'page': 'II/68', 'entry_summary_ar': "فلكي ورياضي من حرّان. رصد الكواكب ٤٢ عامًا في الرقة. سمّاه الأوروبيون 'بطليموس العرب'", 'entry_summary_en': "Astronomer and mathematician from Harran. Observed the stars for 42 years in Raqqa. Europeans called him 'the Ptolemy of the Arabs'."}

full_name.en: Ghiyath al-Din Abu al-Fath Umar ibn Ibrahim al-Khayyam
full_name.tr: Gıyâseddin Ebü'l-Feth Ömer b. İbrâhîm el-Hayyâm
full_name.ar: غياث الدين أبو الفتح عمر بن إبراهيم الخيام

active_places.role: Isfahan Observatory director under Malik Shah

title.en: Risāla fī al-Barāhīn ʿalā Masāʾil al-Jabr wa-l-Muqābala
title.tr: Cebir ve Mukâbele Meselelerinin İspâtları Üzerine Risâle
title.ar: رسالة في البراهين على مسائل الجبر والمقابلة

significance.en: Systematic classification and geometric solution of all cubic equations — 500 years before Cardano
significance.tr: Tüm kübik denklemlerin sistematik sınıflandırması ve geometrik çözümü — Cardano'dan 500 yıl önce

significance.en: Solar calendar accurate to 365.2421986 days — more precise than the Gregorian calendar
significance.tr: 365.2421986 gün hassasiyetinde güneş takvimi — Gregoryen takviminden daha hassas

key_contribution.en: Solved all 25 types of cubic equations geometrically and created the Jalali calendar — more accurate than the Gregorian calendar that replaced it 500 years later
key_contribution.tr: Tüm 25 tip kübik denklemi geometrik olarak çözdü ve Celâlî takvimini oluşturdu — yerine geçen Gregoryen takviminden 500 yıl öncesi olmasına rağmen daha hassas
key_contribution.ar: حلّ جميع أنواع المعادلات التكعيبية الـ٢٥ هندسيًا وأنشأ التقويم الجلالي — أدقّ من التقويم الغريغوري

scholarly_context.en: Khayyam's mathematical genius is overshadowed in Western reception by FitzGerald's Rubaiyat translations (1859). In his own time, he was known primarily as a mathematician who classified cubic equations into 25 types and proved they could be solved by conic-section intersections. His Jalali calendar (365.2421986 days) is accurate to within 1 second per year — the Gregorian calendar (365.2425 days) is less precise.
scholarly_context.tr: Hayyâm'ın matematiksel dehası Batı'daki alımlanmasında FitzGerald'ın Rubâiyyât çevirileriyle (1859) gölgelenir. Kendi zamanında esas olarak kübik denklemleri 25 tipe sınıflandıran ve konik kesit kesişimleriyle çözülebileceğini kanıtlayan bir matematikçi olarak tanınırdı.
scholarly_context.ar: عبقرية الخيام الرياضية تطغى عليها رباعيات فيتزجيرالد. صنّف المعادلات المكعبة في ٢٥ نوعًا وأثبت حلها بتقاطع المخروطيات. تقويمه الجلالي أدق من الغريغوري

historiographical_note.en: Woepcke's 1851 edition of the algebra treatise revealed Khayyam the mathematician to European scholarship. Rashed and Vahabzadeh (2000) provided the definitive modern analysis. The authorship of many Rubaiyat remains contested (de Blois 2004).
historiographical_note.tr: Woepcke'nin 1851 cebir risalesi edisyonu, matematikçi Hayyâm'ı Avrupa akademisine tanıttı. Rubâiyyât'ların çoğunun yazarlığı tartışmalı olmaya devam ediyor (de Blois 2004).

modern_parallel.en: Known worldwide as a poet, but actually one of history's greatest mathematicians — like Einstein being remembered primarily for his violin playing.
modern_parallel.tr: Dünya çapında şair olarak biliniyor ama aslında tarihin en büyük matematikçilerinden — Einstein'ın esas olarak keman çalmasıyla hatırlanması gibi.

inherited_from.what: Khwarizmi's algebra, Abu Kamil's advanced algebra

transmitted_to.what: Extended Khayyam's cubic equation solutions analytically
Algebraic (rather than geometric) solution of cubics in Ars Magna
Modern Iranian calendar is based on Khayyam's Jalali system

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الخيام، عمر بن إبراهيم', 'death_hijri': 517, 'page': 'V/38', 'entry_summary_ar': 'غياث الدين، شاعر وعالم رياضيات وفلك. من نيسابور. أصلح التقويم الفارسي. اشتهر في الغرب بالرباعيات', 'entry_summary_en': 'Ghiyath al-Din, poet, mathematician and astronomer from Nishapur. Reformed the Persian calendar. Known in the West for the Rubaiyat.'}

full_name.en: Abu Hamid Muhammad ibn Muhammad al-Ghazali
full_name.tr: Ebû Hâmid Muhammed b. Muhammed el-Gazzâlî
full_name.ar: أبو حامد محمد بن محمد الغزالي

active_places.role: Head of Nizamiyya Madrasa — most prestigious chair in Islam
Spiritual retreat at Dome of the Rock

title.en: Iḥyāʾ ʿUlūm al-Dīn (Revival of the Religious Sciences)

significance.en: Monumental synthesis of Islamic law, theology, ethics, and Sufi spirituality — considered the most important Islamic book after the Quran by many scholars
significance.tr: İslam hukuku, teolojisi, ahlakı ve tasavvuf maneviyatının anıtsal sentezi — birçok alim tarafından Kur'an'dan sonra en önemli İslami eser olarak kabul edilir

significance.en: Systematic critique of Aristotelian philosophy — triggered centuries of philosophical debate (Ibn Rushd's counter-response)
significance.tr: Aristoteles felsefesinin sistematik eleştirisi — yüzyıllar süren felsefi tartışmayı tetikledi (İbn Rüşd'ün karşı cevabı)

key_contribution.en: The most influential Islamic thinker after Muhammad — synthesized law, theology, and mysticism into a unified framework, while his philosophical critique reshaped the course of Islamic and European thought
key_contribution.tr: Hz. Muhammed'den sonra en etkili İslam düşünürü — hukuk, teoloji ve tasavvufu birleşik bir çerçevede sentezlerken, felsefi eleştirisi İslam ve Avrupa düşüncesinin seyrini yeniden şekillendirdi
key_contribution.ar: أكثر المفكرين الإسلاميين تأثيرًا بعد النبي محمد ﷺ

scholarly_context.en: Ghazali occupies a unique position: the greatest philosophical critic of philosophy in Islamic history. His Tahafut attacked 20 specific propositions of Farabi and Ibn Sina, using their own Aristotelian logic against them. Paradoxically, this critique preserved philosophy by forcing its engagement with theology. His spiritual crisis and subsequent wandering (1095-1105) produced the Ihya, which unified outward legal observance with inward spiritual transformation.
scholarly_context.tr: Gazzâlî benzersiz bir konum işgal eder: İslam tarihinde felsefenin en büyük felsefi eleştirmeni. Tehâfüt, Fârâbî ve İbn Sînâ'nın 20 spesifik önermesini kendi Aristotelesçi mantıklarını karşılarında kullanarak saldırdı.
scholarly_context.ar: الغزالي يحتل مكانة فريدة: أعظم ناقد فلسفي للفلسفة في تاريخ الإسلام. هاجم ٢٠ قضية للفارابي وابن سينا مستخدمًا منطقهما الأرسطي ضدهما

historiographical_note.en: The old narrative that Ghazali 'killed Islamic philosophy' (Renan 1852) has been systematically dismantled by Frank (1992), Griffel (2009), and others who show that post-Ghazali Islamic philosophy actually flourished in new directions. Ghazali's influence on David Hume's causality critique (via Averroes chain) is an active area of research.
historiographical_note.tr: Gazzâlî'nin 'İslam felsefesini öldürdüğü' eski anlatısı (Renan 1852), Frank (1992), Griffel (2009) ve diğerleri tarafından sistematik olarak çürütüldü.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a Harvard professor at the peak of fame having a public breakdown, abandoning everything, wandering alone for 10 years — then returning with a book that reshapes an entire civilization's intellectual and spiritual life.
modern_parallel.tr: Şöhretin zirvesindeki bir Harvard profesörünün kamusal bir çöküş yaşayıp her şeyi bırakıp 10 yıl tek başına dolaşmasını düşünün — sonra tüm bir medeniyetin entelektüel ve manevi hayatını yeniden şekillendiren bir kitapla geri dönmesini.

inherited_from.what: Farabi and Ibn Sina's Aristotelian philosophy (to critique it)

transmitted_to.what: Scholastic engagement with Ghazali's arguments via Latin translations
Ihya became the standard reference for integrating law and spirituality

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الغزالي، محمد بن محمد', 'death_hijri': 505, 'page': 'V/22', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو حامد، حجة الإسلام. ولد في طوس. تقلد رئاسة النظامية ببغداد ثم اعتزل. ألّف الإحياء والتهافت والمنقذ', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Hamid, Hujjat al-Islam (Proof of Islam). Born in Tus. Headed the Nizamiyya in Baghdad then withdrew. Authored Ihya, Tahafut, and al-Munqidh.'}

full_name.en: Abu al-Qasim Khalaf ibn al-Abbas al-Zahrawi
full_name.ar: أبو القاسم خلف بن العباس الزهراوي

active_places.role: Court physician to Caliph al-Hakam II

title.en: Kitāb al-Taṣrīf li-man ʿAjiza ʿan al-Taʾlīf
title.ar: كتاب التصريف لمن عجز عن التأليف

significance.en: 30-volume medical encyclopedia with 200+ illustrated surgical instruments — used in European medical schools for 500 years
significance.tr: 200'den fazla resimli cerrahi alet içeren 30 ciltlik tıp ansiklopedisi — 500 yıl boyunca Avrupa tıp okullarında kullanıldı

key_contribution.en: Father of surgery — designed 200+ surgical instruments (many still used in modified form today) and wrote the definitive surgical textbook that European doctors relied on for 500 years
key_contribution.tr: Cerrahinin babası — 200'den fazla cerrahi alet tasarladı (çoğu bugün modifiye edilmiş biçimde hâlâ kullanılıyor) ve Avrupa doktorlarının 500 yıl güvendiği kesin cerrahi ders kitabını yazdı
key_contribution.ar: أبو الجراحة — صمّم أكثر من ٢٠٠ أداة جراحية وكتب الكتاب الجراحي المرجعي

scholarly_context.en: Zahrawi's Tasrif, especially its 30th volume on surgery, was the first illustrated surgical manual. He described procedures for cataracts, lithotripsy, thyroidectomy, and cauterization, and invented instruments including the surgical needle, forceps, and ligature. The Latin translation by Gerard of Cremona (c. 1150) made it the standard surgical reference at Salerno, Montpellier, and Paris.
scholarly_context.tr: Zehrâvî'nin Tasrîf'i, özellikle cerrahi üzerine 30. cildi, ilk resimli cerrahi el kitabıydı. Katarakt, litotripsi, tiroidektomi ve koterizasyon prosedürlerini anlattı ve cerrahi iğne, forseps ve ligatür dahil aletler icat etti.
scholarly_context.ar: التصريف أول دليل جراحي مصوّر. وصف إجراءات الساد وتفتيت الحصى واستئصال الغدة الدرقية واخترع الإبرة الجراحية والملقط والرباط

historiographical_note.en: Spink and Lewis's 1973 translation of the surgical volume revealed Zahrawi's innovations to modern medical historians. The claim of '200+ instruments' is based on detailed illustrations in surviving manuscripts — some are elaborations of earlier designs, but many are demonstrably original.
historiographical_note.tr: Spink ve Lewis'in 1973 cerrahi cilt çevirisi, Zehrâvî'nin yeniliklerini modern tıp tarihçilerine tanıttı.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine a surgeon who not only performed operations no one else could, but also designed his own instruments, drew detailed blueprints of each one, and then wrote a textbook so good that surgical students used it for the next 500 years.
modern_parallel.tr: Başka kimsenin yapamadığı ameliyatları yapan, kendi aletlerini tasarlayan, her birinin detaylı planını çizen ve sonra o kadar iyi bir ders kitabı yazan bir cerrah düşünün ki cerrahi öğrencileri sonraki 500 yıl boyunca kullandı.

inherited_from.what: Paul of Aegina's surgical manual, Galenic anatomy
Razi's clinical methodology, earlier Andalusian medical tradition

transmitted_to.what: Latin translation of Tasrif's surgical volume
Adopted Zahrawi's ligature and cauterization techniques

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الزهراوي، خلف بن العباس', 'death_hijri': 404, 'page': 'III/49', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو القاسم، طبيب وجراح أندلسي. اشتهر بكتاب التصريف. يُعدّ أبا الجراحة في العالم الإسلامي', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu al-Qasim, Andalusian physician and surgeon. Famous for Kitab al-Tasrif. Considered the father of surgery in the Islamic world.'}

full_name.en: Abu al-Walid Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Rushd
full_name.tr: Ebü'l-Velîd Muhammed b. Ahmed İbn Rüşd
full_name.ar: أبو الوليد محمد بن أحمد ابن رشد

significance.en: Systematic defense of Aristotelian philosophy against Ghazali — foundational for European Scholasticism
significance.tr: Gazzâlî'ye karşı Aristoteles felsefesinin sistematik savunusu — Avrupa Skolastisizminin temeli

significance.en: General principles of medicine — complemented Ibn Zuhr's practical Taysir
significance.tr: Tıbbın genel ilkeleri — İbn Zühr'ün pratik Teysîr'ini tamamladı

key_contribution.en: The 'Commentator' — his Aristotle commentaries were so authoritative that European philosophers simply called him 'the Commentator.' Saved rationalist philosophy for both Islamic and Christian civilizations
key_contribution.tr: 'Şârih' — Aristoteles şerhleri o kadar otoriteydi ki Avrupalı filozoflar ona basitçe 'Şârih' dediler. Akılcı felsefeyi hem İslam hem Hristiyan medeniyetleri için kurtardı
key_contribution.ar: الشارح — شروحه على أرسطو كانت حجّة لدرجة أن الفلاسفة الأوروبيين سمّوه ببساطة 'الشارح'

scholarly_context.en: Ibn Rushd's 38 Aristotle commentaries (short, middle, and long) were the vehicle through which medieval Europe received Aristotelian philosophy. The Latin Averroist movement at Paris provoked the Condemnations of 1270 and 1277 — ironically, these condemnations forced philosophers to develop new approaches that contributed to the Scientific Revolution. His 'double truth' theory (though likely a misattribution) catalyzed the separation of philosophy from theology.
scholarly_context.tr: İbn Rüşd'ün 38 Aristoteles şerhi (kısa, orta ve uzun), ortaçağ Avrupa'sının Aristoteles felsefesini aldığı araçtı. Paris'teki Latin Averroizm hareketi 1270 ve 1277 Kınamaları'nı kışkırttı.
scholarly_context.ar: شروح ابن رشد الثمانية والثلاثون على أرسطو كانت الوسيلة التي تلقت بها أوروبا الوسطى الفلسفة الأرسطية. حركة الرشدية اللاتينية أثارت إدانات ١٢٧٠ و١٢٧٧

historiographical_note.en: Renan's Averroès et l'Averroïsme (1852) established the narrative of Averroes as the bridge between Greek and European philosophy. Urvoy (1991) and Taylor (2005) have complicated this picture by emphasizing Ibn Rushd's Islamic context and original contributions beyond mere commentary.
historiographical_note.tr: Renan'ın Averroès et l'Averroïsme (1852) eseri İbn Rüşd'ü Yunan ve Avrupa felsefesi arasındaki köprü olarak belirledi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine being so good at explaining someone else's work that an entire continent builds its educational system on your explanations — and then names a philosophical movement after you.
modern_parallel.tr: Birinin eserini açıklamakta o kadar iyi olmayı düşünün ki koca bir kıta eğitim sistemini açıklamalarınız üzerine kursun — ve sonra adınızla bir felsefi akım adlandırsın.

inherited_from.what: Farabi's political philosophy, Ibn Bajja's emanationism

transmitted_to.what: Latin translations of long Aristotle commentaries
Latin Averroism — sparked the Condemnations of 1277

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'ابن رشد، محمد بن أحمد', 'death_hijri': 595, 'page': 'III/306', 'entry_summary_ar': "أبو الوليد، قاضي قرطبة والفيلسوف. اشتهر بشروحه على أرسطو حتى لقّبه اللاتين 'الشارح'", 'entry_summary_en': "Abu al-Walid, judge of Córdoba and philosopher. Famous for Aristotle commentaries to the extent that Latins named him 'the Commentator'."}

full_name.en: Abu Abdullah Muhammad al-Idrisi
full_name.ar: أبو عبد الله محمد الإدريسي

active_places.role: Royal geographer to Norman King Roger II

title.en: Nuzhat al-Mushtāq fī Ikhtirāq al-Āfāq (Tabula Rogeriana)

significance.en: Most accurate world map for 300 years — 70 regional maps with 400-pound silver planisphere
significance.tr: 300 yıl boyunca en doğru dünya haritası — 400 poundluk gümüş planisferle 70 bölgesel harita

key_contribution.en: Created the Tabula Rogeriana — the most accurate world map of the medieval period, drawn for the Norman King of Sicily. It remained the standard reference map for 300 years
key_contribution.tr: Tabula Rogeriana'yı yarattı — ortaçağın en doğru dünya haritası, Sicilya Norman Kralı için çizildi. 300 yıl boyunca standart referans harita olarak kaldı
key_contribution.ar: رسم خريطة العالم الأكثر دقة في العصور الوسطى — بقيت المرجع المعياري ٣٠٠ عام

scholarly_context.en: Idrisi worked at the remarkable multicultural court of Norman Sicily, where Muslim, Christian, and Jewish scholars collaborated under King Roger II. His Tabula Rogeriana combined data from Greek geography (Ptolemy), Islamic geographic tradition (Khwarizmi, Mas'udi), and new intelligence gathered from traders and envoys. The 70-map atlas was accompanied by a 400-pound engraved silver planisphere — one of the most expensive scientific instruments ever created.
scholarly_context.tr: İdrîsî, Müslüman, Hristiyan ve Yahudi alimlerin Kral II. Roger altında işbirliği yaptığı Norman Sicilya'nın olağanüstü çok kültürlü sarayında çalıştı. Tabula Rogeriana, Yunan coğrafyası, İslami coğrafi gelenek ve tüccarlardan toplanan yeni istihbaratı birleştirdi.
scholarly_context.ar: عمل الإدريسي في بلاط صقلية النورماني المتعدد الثقافات. جمعت نزهة المشتاق بيانات من الجغرافيا اليونانية والتقليد الإسلامي واستخبارات التجار

historiographical_note.en: Oman (2020) and Ahmad (1992) documented how Idrisi's maps were more accurate than any European equivalent until the 15th century. The silver planisphere was destroyed during a palace revolt in 1160 — only the maps and text survive.
historiographical_note.tr: Oman (2020) ve Ahmad (1992), İdrîsî'nin haritalarının 15. yüzyıla kadar herhangi bir Avrupa eşdeğerinden daha doğru olduğunu belgeledi.

modern_parallel.en: Imagine Google Maps — but made by hand, on a 400-pound silver disc, in 1154. And it was the most accurate map in the world for the next 300 years.
modern_parallel.tr: Google Maps'i düşünün — ama elle, 400 poundluk bir gümüş disk üzerinde, 1154'te yapılmış. Ve sonraki 300 yıl boyunca dünyanın en doğru haritasıydı.

inherited_from.what: Khwarizmi's corrected Ptolemy, Mas'udi's geographic observations
Intelligence from Roger II's trade networks and envoys

transmitted_to.what: Influenced portolan charts and Catalan Atlas (1375)
Piri Reis may have used Idrisi's data
Tabula Rogeriana data circulated among navigators

references.alam: {'name_ar': 'الإدريسي، محمد بن محمد', 'death_hijri': 560, 'page': 'I/280', 'entry_summary_ar': 'أبو عبد الله، جغرافي من سبتة. عمل في بلاط روجر الثاني النورماني في صقلية. رسم أدق خريطة في القرون الوسطى', 'entry_summary_en': 'Abu Abdullah, geographer from Ceuta. Worked at the court of Norman King Roger II in Sicily. Drew the most accurate medieval world map.'}

full_name.en: Ala al-Din Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Abi al-Hazm al-Qurashi
full_name.tr: Alâeddin Ebü'l-Hasen Alî b. Ebi'l-Hazm el-Kureşî
full_name.ar: علاء الدين أبو الحسن علي بن أبي الحزم القرشي

title.en: Sharḥ Tashrīḥ al-Qānūn (Commentary on the Anatomy of the Canon)

significance.en: First description of pulmonary circulation — 300 years before William Harvey
significance.tr: Pulmoner dolaşımın ilk tanımı — William Harvey'den 300 yıl önce

key_contribution.en: Discovered pulmonary blood circulation 300 years before William Harvey — proved that blood passes from the right to left ventricle via the lungs, contradicting 1,400 years of Galenic doctrine
